response:
WITH airport_flight_counts AS (
    SELECT
        a.airport_code,
        COUNT(f.airport_code) AS total_flights
    FROM airports a
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT origin_airport_code AS airport_code FROM flights
        UNION ALL
        SELECT destination_airport_code AS airport_code FROM flights
    ) f ON a.airport_code = f.airport_code
    GROUP BY a.airport_code
),
ranked_airports AS (
    SELECT
        airport_code,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_flights ASC) AS flight_rank
    FROM airport_flight_counts
)
SELECT airport_code
FROM ranked_airports
WHERE flight_rank = 1;
